title: Payment Solutions for Iranian Digital Sellers: The Minimum Viable Setup That Actually Works
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: Iranian digital sellers face significant hurdles when it comes to receiving payments for their products, as traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe are not available in the country. This leaves many creators without a reliable way to sell their digital goods internationally. The good news is that there are alternative solutions that can help bridge this gap and get Iranian creators paid.
What You Can Actually Get Done Today

The first step towards solving the payment problem for Iranian digital sellers is to explore alternative payment methods that do not rely on traditional banking systems. One such solution is to use blockchain-based payments, which can provide a secure and reliable way to receive payments from customers worldwide. By leveraging blockchain technology, creators can bypass traditional payment processors and get paid directly by their customers.
The Minimum Viable Setup That Works

To get started with blockchain-based payments, Iranian digital sellers need to set up a digital wallet that can receive payments in various cryptocurrencies. This can be done by using a service like NOWPayments, which supports over 300 coins and does not require any KYC verification. Once the wallet is set up, creators can generate a unique payment link or QR code that customers can use to send payments.
Skipping the Steps That Do Not Matter Yet

While there are many different blockchain-based payment solutions available, not all of them are created equal. Some solutions may require extensive technical setup or have high transaction fees, which can eat into a creator's profits. By focusing on simple, user-friendly solutions that have low fees and are easy to integrate, Iranian digital sellers can get up and running quickly without getting bogged down in complex setup processes.
Blockchain-based payments can bypass traditional banking restrictions.
Getting Your First Transaction Live

To get the first transaction live, Iranian digital sellers need to integrate their digital wallet with their sales platform. This can be done by using a plugin or API that connects the wallet to the sales platform, allowing customers to pay for digital products using cryptocurrency. Once the integration is complete, creators can start selling their digital products and receiving payments in cryptocurrency.
What to Do in the Next 24 Hours

In the next 24 hours, Iranian digital sellers can take concrete steps to start selling their digital products internationally. This includes setting up a digital wallet, generating a payment link or QR code, and integrating the wallet with their sales platform. By taking these steps, creators can start receiving payments from customers worldwide and begin building a global customer base.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

To sell digital products internationally as a creator in Africa, you can use blockchain-based payment solutions that do not rely on traditional banking systems. Services like NOWPayments provide a secure and reliable way to receive payments in various cryptocurrencies, allowing you to bypass traditional payment processors and get paid directly by your customers.
Iranian creators can get paid in over 300 cryptocurrencies.
